Open-source browser automation.title: Puppeteer public release page is included as a seeded source
Open-source browser automation.direct_evidence: The source registry includes the public releases page as an approved seed.
Open-source browser automation.inference: A scheduled run can compare visible release entries over time and summarize changes.
discovery_questions: Which release signals matter most: breaking changes, new APIs, security fixes, or examples?

Open-source browser automation.title: Selenium public release page is included as a seeded source
Open-source browser automation.direct_evidence: The source registry includes the public releases page as an approved seed.
